text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Family Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SAKURA COUNSELING NE PORTLAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, couples, and family counseling specializing in BIPOC and LGBTQ+ communities, anxiety, depression, trauma, and multicultural concerns. 650 NE Holladay Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm.
